zh.lifeSummary: 當Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange於1168年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯時，她的父親Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange31歲，母親Thiburge de Montpellier27歲。她於大約1183年與Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil在法國奧其坦尼艾維倫維爾福朗-德-帕納特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange于1168年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯时，她的父亲Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange31岁，母亲Thiburge de Montpellier27岁。她于大约1183年与Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil在法国奧其坦尼艾維倫維爾福朗-德-帕納特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange was born in 1168, in Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, was 31 and her mother, Thiburge de Montpellier, was 27. She married Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil about 1183, in Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1225, in Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange est née en 1168, à Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Thiburge de Montpellier, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil environ 1183, à Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1225, à Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange 1168 in Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange 31 und ihre Mutter Thiburge de Montpellier 27. Sie hat um 1183 in Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, Frankreich Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1225 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil circa 1183, nel Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1225, nel Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orangeが1168年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンレス バウクス-デ-プローベンスで生まれた時，父Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orangeは31歳，母Thiburge de Montpellierは27歳であった。約1183年にフランスオクシタニーエイビーロンヴィレフランチェ-デ-プアナトでLambert Ier Adhémar de Monteilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメモントeリマーで57歳で死去した。

ko.La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, P: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 라 로크-드'아스e런
ko.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 레스 바스-데-프로븐스
ko.lifeSummary: Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange(이)가 1168년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 레스 바스-데-프로븐스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thiburge de Montpellier(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1183년 프랑스 옥시탠이 에비런 비레프랭체-데-파냇에서 Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 몽e리마에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange nasceu em 1168, em Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Thiburge de Montpellier, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil aproximadamente 1183, em Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1225, em Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 57 anos.

ru.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: лесь баукс-де-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange родилась в 1168 г. в местности лесь баукс-де-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Thiburge de Montpellier, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil около 1183 г. в местности виллефрэнче-де-панат, авирон, окситани, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности монтeлимар, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, P: La Roque-d'Anthéron, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia
es.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange nació en 1168, en Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Thiburge de Montpellier, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil aproximadamente 1183, en Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1225, en Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
